meta.title: Hyper-Connectivity Will Improve Cybersecurity
meta.description: Dave Weinstein makes the counterintuitive point that  hyper-connectivity will improve cybersecurity / reduce risk. Up until now hyper-connectivity has tracked with improved offense while defense lags. Dave's point is hyper-connectivity paired with the possible visibility this hyper-connectivity provides will help defense much more than the attacker.
